summary: P0 Features testing completed - All 4 features working: Invite system, Templates, AI Agent TCs, Tags improvement. Backend 19/19 tests passed, Frontend UI verified.

ui_bugs.issue: Chatbot button blocked by Emergent badge overlay at bottom-right corner

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Tagged_Document for tag cloud testing, deleted after
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 features fully tested: (1) Invite system with /api/users, /api/invite, /api/users/{id}/role endpoints working, Settings page at /settings shows invite form and team members table, (2) Templates API at /api/templates returns 5 templates, template picker shows when creating new page with 6 options (Blank + 5), (3) AI Agent TCs document 'AI Agent & Orchestration Test Cases' exists under Test Cases with TC-AGT-001 through TC-AGT-015, (4) Tag suggestions at /api/tags/suggestions works, tag cloud shows on home page when docs have tags. Admin token: test_admin_session_token, Viewer token: test_viewer_session_token (blocked from /api/users with 403).

backend.POST /api/invite: PASS - Creates new user with email/role

frontend.Team members table: PASS - Shows 12 users with role dropdowns + delete buttons

backend.GET /api/templates: PASS - Returns 5 templates (api-doc, runbook, rca, meeting-notes, test-plan)

frontend.Template picker: PASS - Shows 6 options (Blank + 5 templates) on new page
frontend.Template applies: PASS - Clicking template fills title and content
frontend.Templates button: PASS - Button in editor header toggles template picker

backend.Categories count: PASS - 44 categories (includes AI Agent & Orchestration Tests)

frontend.Document navigation: PASS - Accessible via Test Cases > AI Agent & Orchestration Test Cases
frontend.Content display: PASS - Shows TC tables with TC ID, Priority, Component, Steps, Expected Results

backend.GET /api/tags/suggestions: PASS - Returns list (empty if no tags)

frontend.Tag input: PASS - Tag input field present in editor
frontend.Tag cloud: PASS - Shows on home page when documents have tags
frontend.Tag filtering: PASS - Clicking tag shows filtered documents

regression.Mermaid diagrams: PASS - Rendered in System Architecture Overview
